config.name: armis_armis_logs-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: armis_armis_logs-latest 
-- OCSF Class: Security Finding (1001)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T10:59:47.949551

-- Pre-compile frequently used patterns
local TIMESTAMP_PATTERN = "^%d+%.?%d*$"

-- Cached references for better performance
local type = type
local pairs = pairs
local tonumber = tonumber
local os_time = os.time
local string_format = string.format

-- Validation helper functions
local function validate_string(str)
    return type(str) == "string" and str ~= ""
end

local function validate_number(num)
    return type(num) == "number" and num > 0
end

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output with required fields
    local output = {
        class_uid = 1001,
        class_name = "Security Finding",
        category_uid = 1, 
        category_name = "Security Events",
        metadata = {
            version = "1.0.0",
            product = {
                name = "Armis",
                vendor = "Armis",
                feature = {
                    name = "Security Platform"
                }
            }
        }
    }

    -- Optimized security finding mapping
    if record.security_finding then
        local finding = record.security_finding
        output.finding = {
            activity_id = finding.activity_id,
            time = tonumber(finding.time) or os_time() * 1000,
            severity = finding.severity,
            message = finding.message,
            type_name = finding.type_name,
            data = finding.data
        }
    end

    -- Efficient policy mapping with validation
    if record.policy then
        local policy = record.policy
        output.policy_info = {
            uid = policy.uid,
            name = policy.name,
            type = policy.type,
            action = {
                id = policy.action_id,
                name = policy.action_name
            },
            effective_time = tonumber(policy.effective_time),
            is_active = policy.is_active,
            owner = policy.owner,
            tags = policy.tags
        }
    end

    -- Optimized device info mapping
    if record.device then
        local device = record.device
        output.device_info = {
            id = device.id,
            name = device.name,
            ip = device.ip,
            ipv6 = device.ipv6,
            category = device.category,
            type = device.type,
            model = device.model,
            risk_level = device.risk_level,
            location = device.location,
            user = device.user,
            metadata = {
                is_corporate = device.is_corporate,
                is_encrypted = device.is_encrypted,
                is_sensor = device.is_sensor
            }
        }
    end

    -- Network connection mapping if present
    if record.network_connection_info then
        output.network = {
            protocol = record.network_connection_info.protocol_name,
            port = tonumber(record.network_endpoint.port)
        }
    end

    -- Validation of critical fields
    if not output.finding or not output.finding.time then
        output.finding = output.finding or {}
        output.finding.time = os_time() * 1000
    end

    -- Final validation before return
    if not output.class_uid or output.class_uid == 0 then
        return nil, "Invalid OCSF class_uid"
    end

    return output
end

-- Error handler wrapper
function safe_transform(record)
    local success, result = pcall(transform, record)
    if not success then
        return nil, string_format("Transform error: %s", result)
    end
    return result
end
